subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Covenant! Give thanks unto God that thou art intoxicated from the chalice of the Covenant and, like unto a brimming cup, art filled with its rapture [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده میثاق شکر کن خدا را که از پیمانه پیمان سرمستی و مانند جام لبریز نشئه
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
